affirmations.text: I'm certain that I will be financially free and abundant the next month.
I am certain that Caldera will bring at least 10k per month.
I love the creation and building process, and I'm so lucky to have all these tools for my creativity and imagination.
HyperSpace is live and is launching very soon. It will be one of the best moments of my life and create a new path for me.
I see myself in my own place a few months from now.
I trust the Universe to guide me and I understand that everything is part of the journey.
I really am in the pursuit of greatness, I enjoy growing and progressing and getting better so much and I really see myself becoming one of the greats and I'm not afraid to say it.

I trust that following this incredible system that the universe has been creating in the background for me will truly make me limitless and give my life a whole new gameplay experience. It will make me special and that will give me an advantage in all of my work and my social interactions.
Creation and art feels as a form of self expression that just comes out of me.
My hard work will reap incredible benefits, both socially and financially. I will see abundance in both of these aspects.
Right now, at this moment, I'm closer to my desired reality and higher self than I've ever been. Each moment is a step on an unexplored path that ultimately leads to my dream destination.
Everyday, I'm becoming more and more limitless.
